@@ -140,0 +140,1 @@
+			<Method name="getLogger" />
@@ -1362,0 +1363,17 @@
+
+	<!-- False positive: contains() return values are used in if-conditions -->
+	<Match>
+		<Or>
+			<Class name="org.openjdk.jmc.ui.ai.provider.claude.ClaudeApiClient"/>
+			<Class name="org.openjdk.jmc.ui.ai.provider.openai.OpenAIApiClient"/>
+		</Or>
+		<Method name="processSSELine"/>
+		<Bug pattern="RV_RETURN_VALUE_IGNORED"/>
+	</Match>
+
+	<!-- False positive: already uses ChatBrowser.class.getResourceAsStream(), not getClass() -->
+	<Match>
+		<Class name="org.openjdk.jmc.ui.ai.views.ChatBrowser"/>
+		<Method name="readTemplate"/>
+		<Bug pattern="UI_INHERITANCE_UNSAFE_GETRESOURCE"/>
+	</Match>
